school.mission: We provide a stimulating and credible learning environment which will produce dynamic and talented young Ugandan citizens.
school.vision: To ensure all learners are equipped to meet the challenges of life.

title: Sir Apollo Kaggwa Primary School Kira
defaultDescription: Sir Apollo Kaggwa Primary School - Kira is a private primary school registered with the ministry of education and sports with a UNEB centre number offering Education to Ugandan and non-Ugandan children based on the Ugandan Curriculum and equipping them with necessary life skills.
